title: Ronseal 6886271-HHW Smooth Finish Filler Multi-Purpose Ready Mixed 900g, White
features: The Ronseal RSLMPRMF6VP is supplied in a Plastic tub with re-sealable lid.
Ronseal multi-purpose produces an extremely smooth finish and has excellent application properties coupled with strength and flexibility
Ideal for making repairs to plaster, stone, concrete or wood
description: Product Description The Ronseal Multi Purpose Wall Filler is a general purpose filler, based on Acrylic Polymer and fine Dolomite fillers, for interior and exterior use, and Surface dry in 1 to 2 hours. Ronseal multi-purpose produces an extremely smooth finish and has excellent application properties coupled with strength and flexibility. Ideal for making repairs to plaster, stone, concrete or wood. It is easy to sand and gives excellent adhesion, also gives a long lasting repairs that won't shrink or crack. Available in Tub or Tube format. Ronseal applicator included. Can be drilled once dried hard. Areas of use: Interior walls and ceilings. Application: Filling Knife. Drying time approx.: 2 hours. Protection level: High. Available in various sizes. Box Contains 1 x Multi-Purpose Smooth Finish Ready Mixed Wall Filler with 50 Percent Extra
